turns.content:
<objective>Investigate 4 flaw domains in hivemind-plugin-private project. Reproduce each flaw. Document ONLY reproduction steps, code paths, observed behavior. NO conclusions, NO opinions, NO fix suggestions. State facts only.</objective>

**Reproduction instructions:**

Domain 1 - tmux-copilot Permission:
1. Run as any agent NOT in ORCHESTRATOR_AGENTS (e.g. hm-executor, gsd-debugger, build)
2. Call tmux-copilot({action: "peek", paneId: "%12"})
3. Observe permission-denied error
4. Also test: list-panes, send-keys, take-over
5. Document which actions pass/fail for each agent type

Files to read for evidence:
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts:59-64 (ORCHESTRATOR_AGENTS definition)
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts:114-118 (USER_SESSION_ALLOWED_ACTIONS)
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts:249-259 (permission gate execution)

Domain 2 - Child Session Backchannel:
1. Dispatch a child session via delegate-task
2. While child is running, try reading its interim output
3. Try sending a structured prompt to the running child
4. Observe that forward-prompt only sends keystrokes to tmux pane, not to child SDK session

Files to read:
- src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts:192-312 (dispatch flow)
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts:153-158 (forward-prompt schema - requires paneId, not sessionId)
- src/coordination/completion/notification-handler.ts:260-301 (notifyParentSession uses sendPromptAsync)
- src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts (status/progress actions return counts, not content)

Domain 3 - Agent Looping from Child Emissions:
1. Trace notifyDelegationTerminal at notification-handler.ts:328-363
2. It calls sendPromptAsync(parentSessionId, {noReply: true, text: notification}) at line 353
3. The notification contains <system_reminder> tags (notification-handler.ts:59)
4. Trace notificationRouter.route() to see how it calls notifyDelegationTerminal
5. Trace reactivateSessionStream at notification-handler.ts:187-206 - sends EMPTY prompt to reawaken stopped parent
6. Check if PeriodicNotifier keeps emitting events after child completes
7. Check what happens when parent receives notification while parent's stream is stopped vs running

Files to read:
- src/coordination/completion/notification-handler.ts (full)
- src/coordination/delegation/notification-router.ts (full)
- src/coordination/delegation/periodic-notification.ts (full)
- src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts:630-723 (routeTerminal, cleanup)

Domain 4 - universal-rules.md Truncation:
1. Check .opencode/rules/universal-rules.md at committed version (190 lines)
2. Check assets/rules/universal-rules.md (currently 102 lines)
3. Check current working tree .opencode/rules/universal-rules.md (102 lines)
4. Committed version has sections 7-10 (TDD governance, Anti-Patterns, Entry Point)
5. Source template is MISSING these 88 lines
6. npm run build reflects assets/rules/ -> .opencode/rules/ (asset sync overwrites deploy)

<files_to_read>
- .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/03-flaw-elaboration.md
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts (full)
- src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts (full)
- src/coordination/delegation/notification-router.ts (full)
- src/coordination/delegation/periodic-notification.ts (full)
- src/coordination/completion/notification-handler.ts (full)
- src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts (full)
- assets/rules/universal-rules.md (full)
- scripts/sync-assets.js (check asset reflection logic)
</files_to_read>

<mode>
symptoms_prefilled: true
goal: find_root_cause_only
</mode>

<output_requirements>
Write debug file to: .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/04-debug-root-cause.md

For each domain, document:
1. REPRODUCTION: exact steps to reproduce
2. OBSERVED: what happens when you reproduce (file:line references)
3. CODE PATH: every code path involved, traced from entry to exit
4. EMISSION TRACE: for Domain 3 specifically, trace the exact emission path from child completion -> parent receive -> parent respond -> parent loop
5. No conclusions, no opinions, no fixes

CRITICAL:
- Do NOT modify any source files
- Do NOT modify any .opencode/ files
- Write ONLY to .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/04-debug-root-cause.md
- Facts only
</output_requirements>
